untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 12-month cumulative returns calculation, but the 'returns' indicator in the allowed list is single-period. The backtest engine needs a 252-bar (12-month) rolling return accumulator which is not available in the standard indicator set. Recommend adding 'returns_252' or 'cumulative_returns_12m' to indicator library.
translation_notes: The signal logic (buy on positive 12-month returns, hold 1 month) is conceptually simple but operationally requires a lookback window calculation beyond single-period indicators. Used 'returns > 0' as a partial proxy, but this triggers on any positive single period rather than 12-month cumulative. Monthly rebalance frequency implies hold_days_max ≈ 21 calendar days.
